identity: Human MAN (male), about 30 years old, calm composed face, short dark hair, glowing pale-lavender eyes.
outfit: Long midnight-violet hooded robe with silver rune embroidery along the collar, hem, and cuffs. Subtle deep-navy under-tunic.
weapons: Slim silver staff topped with a floating violet enchantment glyph that pulses pale lavender when channeled.
attackStyle: East-facing. Mid-swing horizontal staff strike with the violet enchantment glyph trailing energy from the staff tip.
spellStyle: East-facing. Both hands raised, silver staff held aloft as a brilliant violet enchantment glyph blooms around it, motes of pale-lavender light drifting outward.
blockStyle: East-facing. Silver staff held horizontally in front as a violet enchantment ward glows along its length.
koStyle: East-facing. Lying on his back unconscious, silver staff fallen beside him, violet enchantment glyph dim.
southStyle: Facing camera (south), calm idle, silver staff held at his side, faint violet glyph hovering near the staff tip.
portraitStyle: Head-and-shoulders bust shot, three-quarter view. Long midnight-violet hooded robe with silver rune embroidery along the collar, calm face, short dark hair, glowing pale-lavender eyes, holding a small floating violet enchantment glyph beside his temple.

referenceSheet.prompt: A male human Enchanter wizard, head-and-shoulders portrait facing forward. Long midnight-violet hooded robe with silver rune embroidery along the collar, calm composed face, short dark hair, glowing pale-lavender eyes, holding a small floating violet enchantment glyph beside his temple. Painted 16-bit SNES JRPG pixel art style, clean black outline, soft cel shading, transparent background.
